__fixture__.name: enterprise_online_install_policy_injected_native_build
__fixture__.scenario: Enterprise-online managed-workspace install of a package that requires native compilation against the local toolchain. Auth resolves through a policy-injected credential against a customer-operated mirror; mirror is pinned (no direct origin admissible). Lockfile gains new entries; one transitive package crosses a major boundary. Rollback is blocked because native artifacts must be recompiled. Apply completes with warnings (build re-run required). Validates policy-injected-credential disclosure, mirror-pinned mirror_or_offline_state, native-build script-risk disclosure (never relabelled as metadata-only), and rollback-blocked-native-artifacts truth before apply.
acceptance_bullets: 1: lockfile / transitive / rollback truth before apply
2: policy-injected credential and mirror-pinned state explicit
3: native compilation never represented as ordinary metadata update

registry_source.registry_disclosure: Customer-operated mirror is the pinned source; direct origin is not admissible under enterprise policy.

registry_auth.auth_disclosure: Credential is injected by org policy; raw token never lives in workspace state.

script_risk.script_risk_disclosure: Native compilation runs against the local toolchain; this is not a metadata-only update.

lockfile_impact.lockfile_impact_disclosure: Five new lockfile entries are added; one transitive package crosses a major boundary.

transitive_impact.transitive_impact_disclosure: One transitive crosses a SemVer major boundary; review surface labels this honestly rather than as a minor change.

rollback_posture.rollback_blocker_note: Lockfile rollback is bounded by native artifact rebuild; the toolchain cache must be re-primed.
rollback_posture.rollback_posture_disclosure: Rollback restores the lockfile checkpoint, but native artifacts must be recompiled before the workspace is fully consistent again.

mirror_or_offline_state.mirror_or_offline_state_disclosure: Online with mirror pinned; direct-origin reads are refused by enterprise policy.

apply_outcome_note: Install completed; native artifacts compiled with warnings; review surface advises a clean rebuild before integration tests.

transport_posture_at_event.transport_posture_note: Enterprise online profile; org-pinned mirror; OS trust store overlaid with org CA bundle.
